title: 10 Thick Beef Collagen Sticks for Dogs by Britten and James (15cm length). A Natural and Healthy Dental Chew Dog Treat - Long Lasting, Grain Free and Hypoallergenic
features: 100% pure beef collagen dog chew with many health benefits for your dog. This a pack of 10 premium thick collagen chews, 15cm in length
Healthy: packed with protein and low in fat - collagen sticks promote and maintain healthy joints, skin elasticity and glossy healthy coat
Natural: hypoallergenic and grain free - these naturally air dried collagen chews contain no nasty additives, flavourings, or preservatives
Long lasting: collagen is a fantastic natural dental stick - a long lasting chew that helps maintain healthy teeth and gums whilst also aiding mental health through endorphin release
Suitable for medium and large breeds and dogs of all ages (3+ months)
Packed in the U.K by Britten and James. Britten and James is a registered trademark
description: Product Description A British owned family business providing premium quality products at competitive prices At Britten and James we only source our products from the best suppliers, ensuring products are both responsibly and ethically sourced. We work with our suppliers, forming long standing relationships which enable us to provide customers with premium quality products, but still at competitive prices. Our friendly team is always on hand to help answer questions and assist. Our treats are naturally good for dogs, and so naturally dogs love them! We have an extensive range of delicious Natural Dog Treats for your dog to try. All products are 100% natural, responsibly sourced and healthy for your four-legged friend. This is a premium quality range with products to suit all breeds and sizes.
